quickWins.description: Eliminate common code patterns in 133 files
Reduce complexity in 98 files through method extraction
Split 86 large files into smaller modules

improvements.title: Duplication Elimination
improvements.description: Extract common code into reusable utilities and shared modules
improvements.approach: Identify common patterns, create utility functions, implement shared libraries

improvements.title: Large File Decomposition
improvements.description: Break down large files into smaller, focused modules
improvements.approach: Apply Single Responsibility Principle, extract related functionality

improvements.title: Critical Path Optimization
improvements.description: Refactor high-usage files to improve overall system performance
improvements.approach: Incremental refactoring with comprehensive test coverage
risks: Potential breaking changes in core functionality
